scripts.db:dump: mkdir -p backups && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T db pg_dump -U gptc -d gptc --clean --if-exists --no-owner --no-privileges > backups/gptc-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).sql
scripts.db:dump:data: mkdir -p backups && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T db pg_dump -U gptc -d gptc --data-only --disable-triggers --no-owner > backups/gptc-data-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).sql
scripts.db:restore: test -n "$FILE" || (echo 'usage: FILE=backups/foo.sql pnpm db:restore' && exit 1) && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T db psql -U gptc -d gptc -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 < $FILE
scripts.media:sync:prod: test -n "$HOST" || (echo 'usage: HOST=user@server PROD_PATH=/srv/gtpcplays pnpm media:sync:prod' && exit 1) && rsync -avz --progress ./media/ $HOST:$PROD_PATH/media-import/
